title: ORSEN Toddler Toys for 3 4 5 6 7 8 Year Old Boys Girls Gifts, LCD Writing Tablet 8.5inch Kids Toys Doodle Board, Dinosaur Drawing Pad for Kids 3 4 5 Year Old Boy Girl Birthday Gifts (Green)
features: Kids Inspiration is Beyond your Imagination: ORSEN LCD writing tablet would be the best electronic alternative toy at an early age. It can be used as a kid's doodle board, educational learning board, memo board, graphic aids, homeschool supplies, autism sensory toys. Kids can release their inspiration doodle easily on it. Having fun is the best way to learn. Every little doodler should have one

100% Safety & Happiness Guarantee: Safety is always the important point when choosing toys for kids. ORSEN LCD writing tablet is made of non-toxic ABS material. Anti-fall and waterproof screen. Screw to lock the battery slot. Kids can play with the drawing board safely. 3 easy steps operation for all age toddlers: Draw→Erase→Draw. Durable and reusable fun

Portable Travel Toys: 8.5inch mini size is suitable for little kids to hold. Lightweight but sturdy. Easy to put in the bag and take everywhere. Great travel toys to keep kids focused anywhere. Get rid of boredom even in a long car trip, road trip, plane, beach, outside travel. The built-in battery has 6 months lifespan, provides 100000 times drawing on the writing tablet

Upgraded Screen Tech: This drawing pad for kids adopts the 2025 newest LCD screen and sensing tech. The colors on the screen are 60% brighter than other tablets in the market. Makes drawing more smoothly and lines more vivid. If you use different pressure to write, it will show different thinness. Brings a more comfortable writing experience

Birthday Gift for Kids: Do you have a hard moment for picking a unique Birthday gift for your little kids? Have a look at this dinosaur shape 8.5 LCD writing tablet! A playable and creative gift for toddlers and kids. They would be surprised and happy to receive this cute one on Christmas, Thanksgiving, Birthday, Children's Day and all other occasions
WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD - Small parts. Not for children under 3 years. Contains button or coin cell battery. Hazardous if swallowed – see instructions
